descricao: Receives leads from Facebook and Instagram Ads via webhook, normalizes the data, logs them in the backoffice and automatically triggers follow-up flows.
problema: Leads from paid media campaigns arrived unstandardized and were processed manually before entering the sales funnel.
resultado: Leads captured and logged automatically in real time, ready for follow-up.
destaques: Calls to modular sub-workflows for logging and follow-up
